creator: mjs@bur.st
text:
G2One, Inc. and the Groovy development team have released Groovy 1.5.5, a bug fix release of the 1.5.x stable branch.

The changelog for this release is located at http://jira.codehaus.org/secure/ReleaseNote.jspa?projectId=10242&styleName=Html&version=14028

Fix: I have attached a patch to update the port to the 1.5.5 release.


Patch attached with submission follows:
